args.code:
import com.rosetta.model.metafields.FieldWithMetaDate;
import com.rosetta.model.metafields.FieldWithMetaString;
import com.rosetta.model.lib.records.Date;
import cdm.event.common.Trade;
import cdm.event.common.TradeIdentifier;
import cdm.base.staticdata.identifier.AssignedIdentifier;
import cdm.base.staticdata.party.Party;
import cdm.base.staticdata.party.PartyIdentifier;
import cdm.base.staticdata.party.Counterparty;
import cdm.base.staticdata.party.PartyRole;
import cdm.base.staticdata.party.metafields.ReferenceWithMetaParty;
import cdm.base.staticdata.party.CounterpartyRoleEnum;
import cdm.base.staticdata.party.PartyRoleEnum;
import cdm.base.staticdata.party.PayerReceiver;
import cdm.product.template.NonTransferableProduct;
import cdm.product.template.EconomicTerms;
import cdm.product.template.Payout;
import cdm.product.template.SettlementPayout;
import cdm.product.template.SettlementTerms;
import cdm.product.template.SettlementDate;
import cdm.product.template.Underlier;
import cdm.product.common.settlement.SettlementTypeEnum;
import cdm.product.template.TradeLot;
import cdm.observable.asset.PriceQuantity;
import cdm.observable.asset.metafields.FieldWithMetaPriceSchedule;
import cdm.observable.asset.PriceSchedule;
import cdm.observable.asset.PriceTypeEnum;
import cdm.base.math.UnitType;
import cdm.base.math.metafields.FieldWithMetaNonNegativeQuantitySchedule;
import cdm.base.math.NonNegativeQuantitySchedule;
import cdm.base.staticdata.asset.common.Asset;
import cdm.base.staticdata.asset.common.Cash;
import cdm.base.staticdata.asset.common.AssetIdentifier;
import cdm.base.staticdata.asset.common.AssetIdTypeEnum;
import com.rosetta.model.lib.meta.ReferenceWithMetaString;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
import com.regnosys.rosetta.common.serialisation.RosettaObjectMapper;
import java.math.BigDecimal;

public class CdmTradeBuilder {

    public static cdm.event.common.Trade buildTrade() {
        return Trade.builder()
            .setTradeDate(FieldWithMetaDate.builder()
                .setValue(Date.of(2001, 11, 12))
                .build())
            .addTradeIdentifier(
                TradeIdentifier.builder()
                    .addAssignedIdentifier(
                        AssignedIdentifier.builder()
                            .setIdentifier(FieldWithMetaString.builder()
                                .setValue("FWD123")
                                .build())
                            .build())
                    .setIssuer(FieldWithMetaString.builder()
                        .setValue("party1")
                        .build())
                    .build())
            .addTradeIdentifier(
                TradeIdentifier.builder()
                    .addAssignedIdentifier(
                        AssignedIdentifier.builder()
                            .setIdentifier(FieldWithMetaString.builder()
                                .setValue("FXD2002987")
                                .build())
                            .build())
                    .setIssuer(FieldWithMetaString.builder()
                        .setValue("party1")
                        .build())
                    .build())
            .addParty(
                Party.builder()
                    .addPartyId(
                        PartyIdentifier.builder()
                            .setIdentifier(FieldWithMetaString.builder()
                                .setValue("party1")
                                .build())
                            .build())
                    .setName(FieldWithMetaString.builder()
                        .setValue("CITIUS33")
                        .build())
                    .build())
            .addParty(
                Party.builder()
                    .addPartyId(
                        PartyIdentifier.builder()
                            .setIdentifier(FieldWithMetaString.builder()
                                .setValue("party2")
                                .build())
                            .build())
                    .setName(FieldWithMetaString.builder()
                        .setValue("UBSWCHZH")
                        .build())
                    .build())
            .addCounterparty(
                Counterparty.builder()
                    .setRole(CounterpartyRoleEnum.PARTY_1)
                    .setPartyReference(ReferenceWithMetaParty.builder()
                        .setGlobalReference("party1")
                        .build())
                    .build())
            .addCounterparty(
                Counterparty.builder()
                    .setRole(CounterpartyRoleEnum.PARTY_2)
                    .setPartyReference(ReferenceWithMetaParty.builder()
                        .setGlobalReference("party2")
                        .build())
                    .build())
            .addPartyRole(
                PartyRole.builder()
                    .setRole(PartyRoleEnum.BUYER)
                    .setPartyReference(ReferenceWithMetaParty.builder()
                        .setGlobalReference("party1")
                        .build())
                    .build())
            .addPartyRole(
                PartyRole.builder()
                    .setRole(PartyRoleEnum.SELLER)
                    .setPartyReference(ReferenceWithMetaParty.builder()
                        .setGlobalReference("party2")
                        .build())
                    .build())
            .setProduct(
                NonTransferableProduct.builder()
                    .setEconomicTerms(
                        EconomicTerms.builder()
                            .addPayout(
                                Payout.builder()
                                    .setSettlementPayout(
                                        SettlementPayout.builder()
                                            .setPayerReceiver(
                                                PayerReceiver.builder()
                                                    .setPayer(CounterpartyRoleEnum.PARTY_1)
                                                    .setReceiver(CounterpartyRoleEnum.PARTY_2)
                                                    .build())
                                            .setSettlementTerms(
                                                SettlementTerms.builder()
                                                    .setSettlementDate(
                                                        SettlementDate.builder()
                                                            .setValueDate(Date.of(2002, 4, 1))
                                                            .build())
                                                    .setSettlementType(SettlementTypeEnum.PHYSICAL)
                                                    .build())
                                            .setUnderlier(
                                                Underlier.builder()
                                                    .setObservable(
                                                        cdm.observable.asset.metafields.ReferenceWithMetaObservable.builder()
                                                            .setValue(
                                                                cdm.observable.asset.Observable.builder()
                                                                    .setAsset(
                                                                        Asset.builder()
                                                                            .setCash(
                                                                                Cash.builder()
                                                                                    .addIdentifier(
                                                                                        AssetIdentifier.builder()
                                                                                            .setIdentifier(
                                                                                                FieldWithMetaString.builder()
                                                                                                    .setValue("GBP")
                                                                                                    .build())
                                                                                            .setIdentifierType(AssetIdTypeEnum.CURRENCY_CODE)
                                                                                            .build())
                                                                                    .build())
                                                                            .build())
                                                                    .build())
                                                            .build())
                                                    .build())
                                            .build())
                                    .build())
                            .build())
                    .build())
            .addTradeLot(
                TradeLot.builder()
                    .addPriceQuantity(
                        PriceQuantity.builder()
                            .addPrice(
                                FieldWithMetaPriceSchedule.builder()
                                    .setValue(
                                        PriceSchedule.builder()
                                            .setValue(new BigDecimal("1.4643"))
                                            .setUnit(
                                                UnitType.builder()
                                                    .setCurrency(FieldWithMetaString.builder()
                                                        .setValue("USD")
                                                        .build())
                                                    .build())
                                            .setPerUnitOf(
                                                UnitType.builder()
                                                    .setCurrency(FieldWithMetaString.builder()
                                                        .setValue("GBP")
                                                        .build())
                                                    .build())
                                            .setPriceType(PriceTypeEnum.EXCHANGE_RATE)
                                            .build())
                                    .build())
                            .addQuantity(
                                FieldWithMetaNonNegativeQuantitySchedule.builder()
                                    .setValue(
                                        NonNegativeQuantitySchedule.builder()
                                            .setValue(new BigDecimal("10000000.0"))
                                            .setUnit(
                                                UnitType.builder()
                                                    .setCurrency(FieldWithMetaString.builder()
                                                        .setValue("GBP")
                                                        .build())
                                                    .build())
                                            .build())
                                    .build())
                            .addQuantity(
                                FieldWithMetaNonNegativeQuantitySchedule.builder()
                                    .setValue(
                                        NonNegativeQuantitySchedule.builder()
                                            .setValue(new BigDecimal("14643000.0"))
                                            .setUnit(
                                                UnitType.builder()
                                                    .setCurrency(FieldWithMetaString.builder()
                                                        .setValue("USD")
                                                        .build())
                                                    .build())
                                            .build())
                                    .build())
                            .build())
                    .build())
            .build();
    }

    public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
        cdm.event.common.Trade trade = buildTrade();

        ObjectMapper mapper = RosettaObjectMapper.getNewRosettaObjectMapper();

        String tradeJson = mapper.writerWithDefaultPrettyPrinter()
            .writeValueAsString(trade);

        // Wrap in {"trade": ...} to match input format
        System.out.println("{\"trade\":" + tradeJson + "}");
    }
}
